narrative:
Cols 69-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,372 registered voters, with 67.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.6 percentage points.
